name: heroicons-animated-archive-box-icon
title: Animated Archive Box Icon
author: Heroicons Animated
description: Renders the Heroicons Archive Box glyph with source-authored on-demand motion and imperative controls.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils so the copied source resolves its bundled support file.
Added isAnimated and prefers-reduced-motion guards to the existing imperative and hover controls.

license.scope: packages/react/src/icons/archive-box.tsx, src/lib/utils.ts, and Heroicons-derived SVG geometry

modifications.change: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils so the copied source resolves its bundled support file. Added isAnimated and prefers-reduced-motion guards to the existing imperative and hover controls.
modifications.reason: Resolved the bundled utility import and added explicit animation disablement and reduced-motion handling.
